title: Hide Happy Earth day image on the left bottom corner of the screen

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
is it possible to remove or hide the image of “Happy Earth day” or in general of the events thats occupy the bottom left corner of the screen?

I know is an important event, but i rather like see better the list of all the boards while i’m working.

posts.author: jerrold (Jerrold john )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @davide.monticelli

When the cursor is placed over the image, the close button will be displayed on the Earth Day image, allowing us to close it.

Thank you.

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml:
As you see i haven’t the X button even with the mouse over.

I found the problem. With this active the X button is not showing.
Than i was able to close the image

image927×551 51.8 KB

Thank you for your support and your time

Davide
